title: AUDIT-FMEA: Auditable Multi-Agent Workflows for Design Failure Analysis
description: Reproducibility artifact for AUDIT-FMEA, including prompts, evidence material, normalized DFMEA outputs, repeated-run and role-ablation outputs, a bicycle/e-bike mechanical disc brake transfer case, metric scripts, generated manuscript figures, source data, a data provenance/evidence-boundary audit, and manuscript-supporting documentation. The artifact supports structural auditability analysis only and does not provide expert validation, physical braking testing, or safety certification evidence.

creators.name: Wei, Chris
creators.affiliation: School of Mechanical, Electronic and Control Engineering, Beijing Jiaotong University
